languages.text: {n}Куравич откладывает инфопластину и тяжело вздыхает.{/n} "Все завалено трупами, Ваша Светлость, вот как справляюсь".

traits.locale_text: {n}Куравич откладывает инфопластину и тяжело вздыхает.{/n} "Все завалено трупами, Ваша Светлость, вот как справляюсь".

languages.text: {n}Kuravich sets aside the data-slate and sighs heavily.{/n} "Everything is piled high with corpses, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. That's how."
languages.original_text: {n}Куравич откладывает инфопластину и тяжело вздыхает.{/n} "Все завалено трупами, Ваша Светлость, вот как справляюсь".

traits.locale_text: {n}Kuravich sets aside the data-slate and sighs heavily.{/n} "Everything is piled high with corpses, Your Grace. That's how."

{n}Kuravich sets aside the data-slate and sighs heavily.{/n} "Everything is piled high with corpses, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. That's how."

languages.text: {n}库拉维奇把数据板放到一旁，重重叹了口气。{/n}“到处都堆满了尸体，大人。就是这么个进展。”
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich sets aside the data-slate and sighs heavily.{/n} "Everything is piled high with corpses, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. That's how."

traits.locale_text: {n}库拉维奇把数据板放到一旁，重重叹了口气。{/n}“到处都堆满了尸体，大人。就是这么个进展。”

languages.text: {n}Kuravich, databelasını bir kenara bırakıp derin bir iç çekiyor.{/n} "Her yer cesetlerle dolup taşmış durumda {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Performansım bu şekilde."
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich sets aside the data-slate and sighs heavily.{/n} "Everything is piled high with corpses, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. That's how."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kuravich, databelasını bir kenara bırakıp derin bir iç çekiyor.{/n} "Her yer cesetlerle dolup taşmış durumda {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Performansım bu şekilde."

languages.text: {n}Kuravich pose sa plaque de données et pousse un long soupir.{/n} « Je croule sous les cadavres, Votre Seigneurie, si vous voulez tout savoir. »
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich sets aside the data-slate and sighs heavily.{/n} "Everything is piled high with corpses, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. That's how."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kuravich pose sa plaque de données et pousse un long soupir.{/n} « Je croule sous les cadavres, Votre Seigneurie, si vous voulez tout savoir. »

languages.text: {n}Kuravich aparta la tablilla de datos y suspira profundamente.{/n} «Todo está lleno de cadáveres, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Eso es lo que ha cambiado».
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich sets aside the data-slate and sighs heavily.{/n} "Everything is piled high with corpses, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. That's how."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kuravich aparta la tablilla de datos y suspira profundamente.{/n} «Todo está lleno de cadáveres, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Eso es lo que ha cambiado».

languages.text: {n}Kuravich legt den Datablock beiseite und seufzt schwer.{/n} "Überall stapeln sich Leichen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Noch Fragen?"
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich sets aside the data-slate and sighs heavily.{/n} "Everything is piled high with corpses, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. That's how."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kuravich legt den Datablock beiseite und seufzt schwer.{/n} "Überall stapeln sich Leichen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Noch Fragen?"

languages.text: {n}クラビッチはデータスレートを置いて深くため息をついた。{/n}「全てが死体で溢れている、{mf|閣下|閣下}。それがその通りだ」
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich sets aside the data-slate and sighs heavily.{/n} "Everything is piled high with corpses, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. That's how."

traits.locale_text: {n}クラビッチはデータスレートを置いて深くため息をついた。{/n}「全てが死体で溢れている、{mf|閣下|閣下}。それがその通りだ」
